title: Check the status of a loan or credit application
text: You can track a loan or credit application in the app under Loans & Credit, where each application shows a status of Submitted, In Review, Approved, or Declined. Most decisions are automated and completed within one to two business days, though some applications need a manual review that takes longer. If more information is required, you'll get a notification listing exactly what to upload. We can't share a decision before the review completes, but support can confirm your application was received.
